language.prompt:
Welcome! Please choose your language:

Makadii! Sarudzai mutauro wenyu:

waitlist.welcome:
Waiswa pawaitlist yedu.

Mumwe wedu achaverenga chikumbiro chako ogamuchira account yako munguva pfupi. Tichakutumira message kana wagamuchirwa.

Panguva ino tumira imwe message nezita reshop yako.
waitlist.shop_name_noted:
Tatenda! Taziva zita reshop yako "{shop_name}".

Uchiri pakumirira. Tichaverenga chikumbiro chako munguva pfupi.
waitlist.still_pending:
Tatenda ne message yako! Uchiri pakumirira pa waitlist.

Tichaverenga chikumbiro chako munguva pfupi. Tichakutumira message kana wagamuchirwa.
waitlist.rejected: Sorry, hatikwanisi kugamuchira chikumbiro chako. Bata agent wedu kana uchifunga kuti pakanganisika.

approval.welcome:
Makadii! Account yako yagamuchirwa paAuto Tuck Shop!

Shop: {company}

Unogona kutumira audio (voice note) kana kunyora zvawatengesa nhasi. Semuenzaniso:
'2 Mazoe $3 rimwe'
kana: '5 chingwa R18 rimwe, 2 shuga R40 rimwe'

Unogona kunyora ne USD ($), Rand (R), uye ZiG.

Unogona kuisa mutengesi wenyu nekutumira:
'add assistant +2637812345678'

audio.download_failed: Sorry, handina kuwana audio yako. Edza zvakare kana tumira message yekunyora.
audio.transcription_failed: Sorry, handina kunzwa zvakanaka audio yako. Tumira message yekunyora.

assistant.not_owner: Sorry, muridzi we shop ndiye anokwanisa kuwedzera mutengesi. Taura nemutengesi kana uchida rubatsiro.
assistant.missing_phone: Handina kuona nhamba yefoni. Tumira message yose zvakare, semuenzaniso: 'add assistant +2637812345678'

closing.prompt: Munozara ngehawa ngapi nhasi kuti ndikugadzirire maererano emazuva ano ezvemari?
closing.acknowledged: Zvakanaka, ndaziva. Ndichakutumira maererano kana shop yazara.
closing.invalid_time: Handina kunzwisisa nguva iyo. Ndapota pindura ngehawa, sekuti '6pm' kana '18:00'.
closing.normal_time_set: Zvakanaka! Ndichakutumira maererano ne{time} mazuva ose. Hauchadzidzisi nguva yekuzara zvakare.

sales_query.not_registered: Sorry, account yako haisati yagadzirwa. Taura na administrator we shop yako.

sale.no_products: Handina zvinotengeswa zvandaona. Tumira zvawatengesa patsva, semuenzaniso: "2 Mazoe $3 rimwe" kana "5 chingwa R18 rimwe, 2 shuga R40 rimwe"
sale.missing_prices_note:
Zvimwe zvinhu hazvina mutengo. Dzvanya "Gadzirisa" wosenda nemutengo, sekuti "2 cokes @ $1.50" kana "2 cokes @ R15" kana 
 "2 bread @ ZiG40".
sale.bot_mistake: Tarasa sale ranga ranyorwa. Sendai patsva.
sale.cancelled: ✗ Tarasa sale ranga ranyorwa. Sendai patsva.
sale.already_processed: Sale iri ranga ratonyorwa kudhara kana kuti harina kuwanika
sale.price_too_large: Waisa price yakawanda. Tarisisa wosenda patsva, sekuti "ndatengesa 2 ma coke $1.50 imwe" kana "2 ma coke R15 imwe"
